name: development-workflow
description: Generic development workflow skills for Codex agents: evidence-based handoff, post-merge protocol, PR fix continuation, review gates, deploy checks, dirty worktree safety, and wrong-direction recovery after user feedback.

interface.longDescription: Helps Codex agents continue software development from evidence: branch and PR state, post-merge updates, same-PR fixes, monster review tracking, deploy checks, prod-ready checks, dirty worktree handling, wrong-direction recovery after user feedback, and redacted handoff output.
defaultPrompt: Use $development-handoff after a merge, PR fix, review, deploy or interrupted agent session.
Use $feedback-recovery when the user says the current result is wrong, off-spec, or not pixel-perfect.
